markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Sync on content production, product launch timelines, and performance tracking.](https://fathom.video/share/keL_uyGwsq1LiD8PYyxm7zTj7LLoGLxw?tab=summary&timestamp=142.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Content Focus Shift:** Pausing "Agent Use Cases" for now to prioritize building highly technical "Connectors Pages," which will auto-populate from GitHub content.](https://fathom.video/share/keL_uyGwsq1LiD8PYyxm7zTj7LLoGLxw?tab=summary&timestamp=222.0)
  - [**Product Launch Timeline:** The new product launches in phases: private beta (next week), public beta (late Feb), and official launch (May).](https://fathom.video/share/keL_uyGwsq1LiD8PYyxm7zTj7LLoGLxw?tab=summary&timestamp=602.0)
  - [**Performance Tracking:** Moving from Scrunch to GrowthX's new platform, CheckThat.ai, to improve prompt tracking for the agentic content strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/keL_uyGwsq1LiD8PYyxm7zTj7LLoGLxw?tab=summary&timestamp=853.0)
  - [**Traffic Growth:** Agentic content is driving strong traffic growth (250 sessions last week, 6x from Dec), but engagement is low.](https://fathom.video/share/keL_uyGwsq1LiD8PYyxm7zTj7LLoGLxw?tab=summary&timestamp=1244.0)

## Topics

### Content Strategy & Production

  - [**Production Updates:**](https://fathom.video/share/keL_uyGwsq1LiD8PYyxm7zTj7LLoGLxw?tab=summary&timestamp=142.0)
      - [**Published:** 5 agentic articles, 6 DER articles, and 1 thought leadership piece ("Agentic data infrastructure must be open").](https://fathom.video/share/keL_uyGwsq1LiD8PYyxm7zTj7LLoGLxw?tab=summary&timestamp=142.0)
      - [**In Review:** "Replication is the key for scaling agents" (due today).](https://fathom.video/share/keL_uyGwsq1LiD8PYyxm7zTj7LLoGLxw?tab=summary&timestamp=183.0)
      - [**TLDRs:** Added to 25 existing articles; \~75 historical DER articles will be refreshed over the next few months.](https://fathom.video/share/keL_uyGwsq1LiD8PYyxm7zTj7LLoGLxw?tab=summary&timestamp=147.0)
  - [**"Agent Use Cases" Paused:**](https://fathom.video/share/keL_uyGwsq1LiD8PYyxm7zTj7LLoGLxw?tab=summary&timestamp=222.0)
      - [**Why:** To prioritize "Connectors Pages," which are easier to build by leveraging existing technical content from GitHub and Docs.](https://fathom.video/share/keL_uyGwsq1LiD8PYyxm7zTj7LLoGLxw?tab=summary&timestamp=222.0)
      - [**Future Plan:** GrowthX will wireframe the use case template now to get a head start. Airbyte will provide a 1-month heads-up before engineering work begins.](https://fathom.video/share/keL_uyGwsq1LiD8PYyxm7zTj7LLoGLxw?tab=summary&timestamp=482.0)
  - [**"Connectors Pages" Initiative:**](https://fathom.video/share/keL_uyGwsq1LiD8PYyxm7zTj7LLoGLxw?tab=summary&timestamp=222.0)
      - [**Goal:** Create highly technical pages with auto-populating content (e.g., JSON code snippets) pulled directly from GitHub.](https://fathom.video/share/keL_uyGwsq1LiD8PYyxm7zTj7LLoGLxw?tab=summary&timestamp=222.0)
      - [**Status:** Tanmay is finalizing a Webflow template and investigating the GitHub-to-Webflow API integration.](https://fathom.video/share/keL_uyGwsq1LiD8PYyxm7zTj7LLoGLxw?tab=summary&timestamp=288.0)
      - [**Timeline:** Initial pages are expected to go live in a few weeks.](https://fathom.video/share/keL_uyGwsq1LiD8PYyxm7zTj7LLoGLxw?tab=summary&timestamp=332.0)

### Product Launch Timeline

  - [**Private Beta:** Next week (\~Tuesday).](https://fathom.video/share/keL_uyGwsq1LiD8PYyxm7zTj7LLoGLxw?tab=summary&timestamp=602.0)
      - [No public announcement; direct outreach to initial customers.](https://fathom.video/share/keL_uyGwsq1LiD8PYyxm7zTj7LLoGLxw?tab=summary&timestamp=616.0)
  - [**Public Beta:** Late February.](https://fathom.video/share/keL_uyGwsq1LiD8PYyxm7zTj7LLoGLxw?tab=summary&timestamp=602.0)
  - [**Official Launch:** May.](https://fathom.video/share/keL_uyGwsq1LiD8PYyxm7zTj7LLoGLxw?tab=summary&timestamp=602.0)
  - [**Implication:** Agent use case content can be published before the official launch to support the public beta.](https://fathom.video/share/keL_uyGwsq1LiD8PYyxm7zTj7LLoGLxw?tab=summary&timestamp=438.0)

### Performance Tracking & Tools

  - [**Conversion Tracking:**](https://fathom.video/share/keL_uyGwsq1LiD8PYyxm7zTj7LLoGLxw?tab=summary&timestamp=669.0)
      - [**Tool:** Hockey Stack dashboard.](https://fathom.video/share/keL_uyGwsq1LiD8PYyxm7zTj7LLoGLxw?tab=summary&timestamp=669.0)
      - [**Challenge:** The single "Talk to Sales" form mixes leads for the new product with leads for the existing replication product, making attribution difficult.](https://fathom.video/share/keL_uyGwsq1LiD8PYyxm7zTj7LLoGLxw?tab=summary&timestamp=669.0)
  - [**Prompt Tracking:**](https://fathom.video/share/keL_uyGwsq1LiD8PYyxm7zTj7LLoGLxw?tab=summary&timestamp=853.0)
      - [**Transition:** Moving from Scrunch to GrowthX's new platform, CheckThat.ai.](https://fathom.video/share/keL_uyGwsq1LiD8PYyxm7zTj7LLoGLxw?tab=summary&timestamp=853.0)
      - [**Why:** To improve tracking of agentic content performance.](https://fathom.video/share/keL_uyGwsq1LiD8PYyxm7zTj7LLoGLxw?tab=summary&timestamp=853.0)
      - [**Timeline:** GrowthX will set up the account with new topics/prompts. Airbyte gets access the week of Jan 26 to provide feedback as a design partner.](https://fathom.video/share/keL_uyGwsq1LiD8PYyxm7zTj7LLoGLxw?tab=summary&timestamp=1091.0)
  - [**Looker Dashboard:**](https://fathom.video/share/keL_uyGwsq1LiD8PYyxm7zTj7LLoGLxw?tab=summary&timestamp=1244.0)
      - [**Status:** Updated to focus on agentic content performance.](https://fathom.video/share/keL_uyGwsq1LiD8PYyxm7zTj7LLoGLxw?tab=summary&timestamp=1244.0)
      - [**Metrics:** 250 sessions last week (6x from Dec).](https://fathom.video/share/keL_uyGwsq1LiD8PYyxm7zTj7LLoGLxw?tab=summary&timestamp=1244.0)
      - [**Top Drivers:** "Context Engineering for AI Agents" and "Building Production AI Agents Cohort."](https://fathom.video/share/keL_uyGwsq1LiD8PYyxm7zTj7LLoGLxw?tab=summary&timestamp=1244.0)
      - [**Challenge:** Engagement is lower than desired; GrowthX will explore tactics to improve it.](https://fathom.video/share/keL_uyGwsq1LiD8PYyxm7zTj7LLoGLxw?tab=summary&timestamp=1500.0)

### Website Performance

  - [**Issue:** Agentic article cover images are too large (\~3MB).](https://fathom.video/share/keL_uyGwsq1LiD8PYyxm7zTj7LLoGLxw?tab=summary&timestamp=1561.0)
  - [**Impact:** Slows website load times and consumes excess CDN bandwidth.](https://fathom.video/share/keL_uyGwsq1LiD8PYyxm7zTj7LLoGLxw?tab=summary&timestamp=1561.0)
  - [**Action:** GrowthX will compress all future images.](https://fathom.video/share/keL_uyGwsq1LiD8PYyxm7zTj7LLoGLxw?tab=summary&timestamp=1561.0)

## Next Steps

      - [Send "Replication is the key..." to Kushal for review.](https://fathom.video/share/keL_uyGwsq1LiD8PYyxm7zTj7LLoGLxw?tab=summary&timestamp=183.0)
      - [Compress all future cover images to improve site speed.](https://fathom.video/share/keL_uyGwsq1LiD8PYyxm7zTj7LLoGLxw?tab=summary&timestamp=1561.0)
      - [Set up the CheckThat.ai account with new topics/prompts.](https://fathom.video/share/keL_uyGwsq1LiD8PYyxm7zTj7LLoGLxw?tab=summary&timestamp=1091.0)
  - [**Tanmay:**](https://fathom.video/share/keL_uyGwsq1LiD8PYyxm7zTj7LLoGLxw?tab=summary&timestamp=222.0)
      - [Share the Figma design for the new "Connectors Pages."](https://fathom.video/share/keL_uyGwsq1LiD8PYyxm7zTj7LLoGLxw?tab=summary&timestamp=222.0)
      - [Share the list of new product topics and competitors for CheckThat.ai setup.](https://fathom.video/share/keL_uyGwsq1LiD8PYyxm7zTj7LLoGLxw?tab=summary&timestamp=975.0)
  - [**Nithin:**](https://fathom.video/share/keL_uyGwsq1LiD8PYyxm7zTj7LLoGLxw?tab=summary&timestamp=1561.0)
      - [Share existing agentic article prompts for CheckThat.ai setup.](https://fathom.video/share/keL_uyGwsq1LiD8PYyxm7zTj7LLoGLxw?tab=summary&timestamp=1020.0)
